text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's my day off, so I decide to go for a stroll downtown when...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Mama? Sorry to bother you when you're busy. It's just... I was
wondering about your itinerary for next month.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mhm, mhm... Is that so? Mhm... Got it, thanks! Talk to you later!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Now that I know the hotel she's going to be staying at, I'm all
set! All that's left is getting a present... Hehe! ♪
choice_data_list: Were you on the phone with your mom?
Were you on the phone with your mom?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! What're you doing h—wait, don't tell me—were you eavesdropping? Not a very respectable hobby, if you ask me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Mama's birthday is next month, so I needed to know where to send my present.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know, a surprise. Whether or not Mama will actually be surprised
is another question though.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to think of the number one present for her... The present
that'll make her the happiest, that'll make her think, "That's my little
girl!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You want to help? Hm, I guess having you carry my bags would be
pretty nice.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll let you tag along. Now come on, we haven't got all day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I decide to help Scarlet with her present hunting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But picking a gift is proving to be unexpectedly difficult.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a necklace... Hmmm. It's cute, but I can't picture Mama
wearing this.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This earring is pretty, but a little too gaudy. Something a bit more
refined would fit her better...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but what if I got her clothes? Like this one, it's the most popular
brand name right now—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
—but that's also all it is. You see people wear this everywhere. If it's
for Mama, I want something that feels more special.
choice_data_list: How about a bouquet of flowers?
How about a bouquet of flowers?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not a bad idea... but I really want to give her something with more
oomph. Since it's her birthday and all, I wanna make her jump for joy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I need to pick the number one present for her, a
present only I could think of.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Probably won't find anything else here. Next up, the shopping mall!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. There's a lot to choose from, but none of them scream,
"Mama," to me.
choice_data_list: You really love your mom, huh?
You really love your mom, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course I do! After all, Mama was an amazing racer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She took home plenty of accolades during her racing career, and now
she travels around the world doing all sorts of work.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's like the Umamusume everyone looks up to—she's wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mhm, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The first time I won a race, Mama wasn't there to watch, but she still
left me a voicemail saying, "Congratulations."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
At the time, I was so happy... And even now, she sends me a message
whenever I win.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They're always short and to the point, but to me, they mean the
world.
choice_data_list: Is that why you want to be number one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, something like that. I also just really hate losing, but I'm sure
you know that already.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, that's why I have to pick out the number one present. I
won't settle for anything less! So come on, let's keep looking!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hmmm, I'm starting to run out of ideas. Not sweets, not accessories,
not shoes...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you got any ideas over there? I'll hear you out, but just this
once.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And just so you know, cookie-cutter trinkets won't cut it. It's got to be
something special, something only I could give her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something special, that'll make her happy... What would make
Scarlet's mom hap—I got it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Did you think of something?
choice_data_list: You just need to win a race!
You just need to win a race!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Win a race? And that'll be my present?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It might work, I guess? Mama always messages me when I win,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Becoming number one for Mama... So I'll finish first, and when they
interview me, I'll shout, "Happy birthday, Mama!"
choice_data_list: It'll be the best birthday she's ever had!
It'll be the best birthday she's ever had!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-it would, wouldn't it?! It might not be on the exact day of her
birthday...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But it's definitely something unique, something only I can do. I'll give
my best to Mama!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A sound idea, at least coming from you. I'll give credit where it's due.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's decided! I'm definitely winning the next race! That's what
you want too, right? It's a win-win situation!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Then what are we twiddling our thumbs here for?! Let's go train!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I went a little overboard back there. Sweat's getting in my eyes...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No, I'm only just getting started! I'm feeling really motivated!
choice_data_list: I'm sure your mom will be overjoyed.
I'm sure your mom will be overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mhm... That's what's keeping me going.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I should think of what to say to Mama during my victory
interview!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But for now, let's keep going, Trainer! That number one spot is as
good as mine, so you better put your back into it too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sometime later, Daiwa Scarlet achieves a decisive victory, taking
home the number one spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right on cue, she gets a congratulatory call from her mom. Picking up
the phone, she lights up with a pure and precious smile on her face.
